strengths: 15+ years of software experience with sustained TypeScript/Node.js fullstack work at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq, well beyond the 6-year bar
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) at re:cinq
Strong testing pedigree: TDD practice, authored test libraries, and taught testing/Selenium courses, plus Docker/Kubernetes deployment experience
concerns: No evidence of Nest.js, Vitest, Jest, or Playwright — the JD's named backend framework and testing stack are entirely absent; testing tools cited are D-language and Selenium
Required polyglot profile is unmet: no Kotlin or Python anywhere, and Java exposure is stale (2016–2018 robotics work); career depth is concentrated in niche DLang instead
Frontend history is dominated by Ember.js with React confined to a single role, and there is no explicit evidence of PostgreSQL, auth/security best practices, or breadth beyond AWS

key_factors.factor: Missing core stack (Nest.js, Vitest/Jest/Playwright, thin React)
Language mismatch (no Kotlin/Python, stale Java, DLang-centric career)
AI-agent experience is recent and shallow (~15 months, tooling-adjacent)

response.justification: While the candidate clears the raw years-of-experience bar and has genuine TypeScript/Node.js history, the fit to this specific role is weak. The primary stack is only half-covered: Nest.js and the entire named testing toolchain (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) never appear, React depth rests on one role while Ember.js dominates the frontend record, and the required multi-language proficiency fails on Kotlin and Python with Java last used nearly a decade ago in a robotics context. Much of the candidate's distinctive expertise — DLang libraries, GIS side projects, low-latency D services — is orthogonal to an enterprise TypeScript automation-tooling team, and the AI-agent requirement is met only by roughly fifteen months of recent, infrastructure-adjacent work. The pattern suggests a capable generalist whose center of gravity lies outside this stack, implying meaningful ramp-up risk for a role that expects immediate senior-level ownership of these exact technologies.
